---
name: Defect / Bug
about: Track a technical defect or malfunction
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Short description of the observed malfunction.

## Affected Component
Which service, repository, deployment, workflow or manifest is affected?

## Current Behavior
Describe what currently happens.

## Expected Behavior
Describe what should happen instead.

## Reproduction / Detection
How can the issue be reproduced or under which circumstances does it occur?

## Suspected Cause
Optional initial technical assumption.

## Impact
- [ ] Build/CI failure
- [ ] Deployment failure
- [ ] Runtime instability
- [ ] Functional bug
- [ ] Documentation inconsistency

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Root cause identified
- [ ] Fix implemented
- [ ] Validation successful
